coachView.name: StatusCard
coachView.layout:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><ns2:layout xmlns:ns2="http://www.ibm.com/bpm/CoachDesignerNG" xmlns:ns3="http://www.ibm.com/bpm/coachview"><ns2:layoutItem xsi:type="ns2:CustomHTML" version="8550" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"><ns2:id>7530ab92-82f1-4d45-85bb-7d6fa29c8819</ns2:id><ns2:layoutItemId>statusCardHTML</ns2:layoutItemId><ns2:configData><ns2:id>9d0a5c00-1a7d-4394-88ef-c1c788472a0c</ns2:id><ns2:optionName>@customHTML.contentType</ns2:optionName><ns2:value>TEXT</ns2:value></ns2:configData><ns2:configData><ns2:id>92be8cf3-d0b3-4fa4-83a9-d036e0c696db</ns2:id><ns2:optionName>@customHTML.textContent</ns2:optionName><ns2:value><div class="statuscard-container" role="region" aria-label="Status card">
  <div class="statuscard-content">
    <div class="statuscard-title" aria-label="Card title">
      <span class="title-text"></span>
    </div>
    <div class="statuscard-value" aria-label="Card value">
      <span class="value-text"></span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div></ns2:value></ns2:configData></ns2:layoutItem></ns2:layout>

configOption.name: alignment
configOption.label: Alignment
configOption.description: Text alignment within the card: 'left' or 'center'

configOption.name: variant
configOption.label: Variant
configOption.description: Visual variant: 'default', 'success', 'warning', 'error', 'info'

inlineScript.name: Inline CSS
Inline Javascript
